title: frontend: SimpleTable: Fix stale defaultRowsPerPage after settings change
author: ayushmaan-16

findings.description: defaultRowsPerPage memoized with empty deps [] so it never changes when settings update; both useEffect hooks keyed on it only run once on mount. The stated bug (stale default after settings change) may not actually be fixed.
PR description says useMemo was removed and eslint-disable comment was removed, but both are still present in the diff. Description reflects an earlier commit that was subsequently changed.
Five commits in branch; consider squashing to one before merge with a message that accurately describes the final approach.
Author correctly switched from useLocation() to window.location.search to avoid re-renders on every route change — performance-conscious approach.
